prestazioni: Engine: M13A (1.3L DOHC 16V VVT) forced induction via HKS GT-SS Supercharger Kit (5-7 psi, 180-200whp) with custom billet crank pulley and HKS Super Power Flow SSQV blow-off valve for precise boost control

Exhaust: Fujitsubo Authorize R 4-2-1 stainless header (1.75" primaries) paired with a custom 2.25" straight-pipe system terminating in a Tomei 80mm titanium tip, deleting the rear muffler for optimal scavenging

Suspension: Tein Flex Z coilovers (front: 30-way damping, 20mm drop; rear: 25-way damping, 15mm drop) with Cusco front strut bar (22mm hollow section) and Whiteline adjustable rear sway bar (24mm, 3-position)

Drivetrain: OS Giken Super Lock LSD (2-way, 40% preload) with custom 2.5L Motul Gear 300 fluid, paired with a Spec Stage 3+ clutch (multi-disc, 6 puck) and lightweight flywheel (3.8kg) for rapid engagement
ECU: Haltech Elite 1500 standalone ECU with custom M13A-specific fuel and ignition maps, integrated with AEM X-Series wideband O2 sensor (30-0300) and HKS EVC boost controller (0-30 psi range)
estetica: Aero: Veilside Fortune 03 widebody conversion kit (FRP construction) with custom front splitter (30mm overhang) and rear diffuser (25mm ground clearance), paired with a Seibon carbon fiber hood (Type 2, 50% weight reduction)
Wheels: Work Emotion CR Kiwami (15x7 +38, 4x100 PCD) in Hyper Silver with Toyo R888R tires (195/50R15), shod with Project Kics R40 lug nuts (M12x1.25, closed-end)
Lighting: Philips Ultinon Pro9000 LED headlight bulbs (H4, 6500K) with Morimoto D2S HID projectors (35W, 5500K) and custom C-West JDM-style rear LED taillights (smoked lens, sequential turn signals)

Interior: Bride Zeta III bucket seats (fixed-back, FIA-approved) with Takata 4-point harnesses (6-point bolt-in, SFI 16.1 certified), paired with a Nardi Classic 350mm steering wheel (perforated leather) and Defi BF Advance gauges (oil temp, boost, wideband AFR)
